titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Jabir Ibn Ismail
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Jabir Ibn Ismail

segments: ه عن جابر بن إسماعيل فقد رويته عن أبي- رحمه اللّه- عن سعد بن‌ عبد اللّه، عن سلمة بن الخطّاب، عن محمّد بن اللّيث، عن جابر بن إسماعيل‌.
arabic.text: ه عن جابر بن إسماعيل فقد رويته عن أبي- رحمه اللّه- عن سعد بن‌ عبد اللّه، عن سلمة بن الخطّاب، عن محمّد بن اللّيث، عن جابر بن إسماعيل‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Jabir ibn Ismail has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Salamah ibn Al-Khattab, from Muhammad ibn Al-Laith, from Jabir ibn Ismail.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Jabir ibn Ismail has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Salamah ibn Al-Khattab, from Muhammad ibn Al-Laith, from Jabir ibn Ismail.
